configurations.name: report-editor-server
runtimeArgs: const h=require('http'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path'),root=process.cwd();h.createServer((q,r)=>{let u=decodeURIComponent(q.url.split('?')[0]);let fp=p.join(root,u);if(u==='/'||u==='')fp=p.join(root,'report_block_editor_v1.html');f.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found: '+fp);return}const ext=p.extname(fp);const ct={'.html':'text/html','.js':'application/javascript','.css':'text/css','.json':'application/json'}[ext]||'application/octet-stream';r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':ct+'; charset=utf-8'});r.end(d)})}).listen(5502,'127.0.0.1',()=>console.log('report-editor on http://localhost:5502 root='+root))
